beta.bar: ToMenu is currently in beta — endpoints and response shapes may change
toc.title: On this page
hero.title:
Lunch menus,
structured & accessible.
hero.tagline: ToMenu scrapes daily lunch menus from Slovak restaurants and exposes them via a clean REST API. Filter by city, day, allergens, price, delivery — and build things on top.
what.label: overview
what.title: What is ToMenu?
what.p1: ToMenu aggregates daily lunch menus from Slovak restaurants into a structured, queryable API. Instead of manually checking restaurant websites, you get clean JSON with dish names, prices, allergens, nutritional info, and delivery availability.
what.p2: Currently covering Levice, Slovakia with more cities being added as the project grows. The full week's menu is scraped every day.
feat.week.title: Full week coverage
feat.week.desc: Query any day of the current week, not just today.
feat.allergen.title: Allergen filtering
feat.allergen.desc: 14 standard EU allergens tracked per dish. Filter them out in the query.
feat.delivery.title: Delivery aware
feat.delivery.desc: Know which restaurants offer delivery before you even open the menu.
feat.build.title: Build anything
feat.build.desc: Telegram bots, lunch pickers, office tools, mobile apps — it's just JSON.
auth.label: authentication
auth.title: Authentication
auth.p1: All API requests require an API key passed in the Authorization header.
auth.box_p: Include your key with every request:
auth.p2: Keys are personal and linked to your email. Don't share them. See the Access section below to request one.
ep.label: reference
ep.title: API Endpoints
ep.cities.p: Returns all cities that have been scraped at least once.
ep.week.desc: Which days have data this week
ep.menu.desc: All dishes across all restaurants — filterable
access.label: access
access.title: Get API Access
access.p: ToMenu is currently in early access beta. Keys are issued manually — send a request email and you'll get a key within a day or two.
access.box_p: Tell us what you're building. Keys are free during beta. One key per developer.
access.note: Sends a pre-filled email to contact@tomenu.sk — just hit send.
mailto.subject: ToMenu API Key Request
mailto.body:
Hello,

I would like to request early access to the ToMenu API.

Name: 
What I'm building: 
Expected usage: 

Thank you,
